name: Claudie Workflow Backend
postCreateCommand: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && cd backend && alembic upgrade head && cd ../frontend && npm install
postStartCommand: bash -c 'cd /workspace/backend && nohup uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload > /tmp/uvicorn.log 2>&1 & cd /workspace/frontend && nohup npm run dev -- --port 5173 > /tmp/vite.log 2>&1 &'
